Klein Moretti.eye_color: brown (turns deep black during divination or Cogitation)
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, matching brown coat, round felt hat, old leather shoes
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Ability to see auras (Spirit Vision) by tapping his glabella twice
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver-inlaid black cane used as a dowsing rod
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Eye color transformation and specific use of his cane for 'Dowsing Rod Seeking' divination confirmed.

Leonard Mitchell.primary_clothing: Casual Victorian style, white shirt untucked, black vest draped on

Leonard Mitchell.source_notes: Confirmed high perceptivity and showcased his habit of reciting poetry during the mission.
